title: Treatment of typhoid fever - Canada.ca
content:
## Treatment of typhoid fever
Learn how typhoid fever is diagnosed and treated.
- How to diagnose typhoid fever
- How to treat typhoid fever

## How to diagnose typhoid fever
Typhoid fever is diagnosed through laboratory testing.

## How to treat typhoid fever
Typhoid fever can be treated with prescription drugs from your health care provider.
If you are sick from typhoid fever, you should drink plenty of fluids to prevent dehydration (loss of fluids).
